prompt:
Style: Studio Ghibli style, hand-painted watercolor texture, soft warm lighting, gentle pastel color palette, dreamy atmosphere, Miyazaki aesthetic, delicate linework, watercolor wash background, nostalgic and peaceful mood

Content: A young Asian man with short black hair slicked back, wearing a dark navy mandarin-collar blazer with golden trim and black turtleneck, sitting alone at a wooden table by a large window in a cozy sunlit cafe. He holds a King of Spades playing card loosely, gazing thoughtfully out the window at a beautiful city skyline during golden hour. Warm sunset light streams through the window casting golden reflections. On the table: a steaming cup of coffee, an open notebook. Outside the window, soft fluffy clouds drift over buildings bathed in amber and blue twilight. Cherry blossom petals float gently in the breeze through a slightly open window. Studio Ghibli watercolor style, soft dreamy lighting, hand-painted feel. No charts no graphs no text. Color palette: warm amber gold, soft pink, sky blue, dark navy accents. Peaceful contemplative mood, like a scene from a Ghibli film.
